parameters.content:
## GA4 -> fact_web_daily

AFTER IMPORT:
1. Open 'Config' and set ga4_property_id (GA4 Admin -> Property -> Property details -> Property ID, numeric).
2. Open 'GA4: Run Report' and select your Google Analytics OAuth2 credential (aarav@braind.io).
3. Run once manually after Aryamaan grants Viewer access; check fact_web_daily + data_quality_log.

Grain: date x region x hostname (hostname kept so insights.cwsisecurity.com coverage is visible).
Region from GA4 countryId (alpha-2). Metric 'keyEvents' = GA4 conversions.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fact_web_daily
  (activity_date, region_id, hostname, sessions, key_events, engaged_sessions, source)
VALUES (
  $1,
  (SELECT region_id FROM dim_region WHERE region_code = $2),
  $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uq_fact_web_grain DO UPDATE SET
  sessions = EXCLUDED.sessions,
  key_events = EXCLUDED.key_events,
  engaged_sessions = EXCLUDED.engaged_sessions,
  loaded_at = now();

INSERT INTO data_quality_log (source, run_date, rows_in, rows_written, issues, issue_pct)
VALUES ('ga4', CURRENT_DATE, $1, $2, $3, $4);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $("Build Web Rows").first().json._meta.rows_in }},{{ $("Build Web Rows").all().length }},{{ $("Build Web Rows").first().json._meta.issues }},{{ $("Build Web Rows").first().json._meta.issue_pct }}
